citations.narrative:
In the food preparation and storage room for birds there were two cans of chemical cleaners stored openly on a shelf and
a bottle of glass cleaner stored openly on a table. Two food storage bins were located under this shelf and table.
Additionally, there was an unlabeled gallon bottle of disinfectant stored in the open under the stainless-steel sink.
Potential spillage of toxic or harmful substances in food storage/preparation areas represents a possible risk to the health
and welfare of the birds. Cleaning supplies, disinfectants and other chemicals that are harmful to the birds must not be
stored in food storage and preparation areas but may be stored in cabinets in the animal areas, provided that they are
stored in properly labeled containers that are adequately secured to prevent potential harm to the birds.
Correct by 03-13-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.150(e) 
   
Facilities, general. 
In the food preparation and storage room for birds there were two cans of chemical cleaners stored openly on a shelf and 
a bottle of glass cleaner stored openly on a table. Two food storage bins were located under this shelf and table. 
Additionally, there was an unlabeled gallon bottle of disinfectant stored in the open under the stainless-steel sink. 
Potential spillage of toxic or harmful substances in food storage/preparation areas represents a possible risk to the health 
and welfare of the birds. Cleaning supplies, disinfectants and other chemicals that are harmful to the birds must not be 
stored in food storage and preparation areas but may be stored in cabinets in the animal areas, provided that they are 
stored in properly labeled containers that are adequately secured to prevent potential harm to the birds. 
 
Correct by 03-13-2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
 n
